title: Root, Inc. (ROOT) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Root Inc's Q2 2024 Earnings Conference Call took place on August 7, 2024 at 5:00 PM ET. The company reported strong results with a 79% year-over-year improvement in net loss, reducing it to $8 million. Root Inc achieved operating income and positive adjusted EBITDA for the second consecutive quarter. Adjusted EBITDA was $12 million, a year-over-year improvement of $24 million. Root achieved a gross loss ratio of 61.6%, one of the best in the industry. Operating cash flow was positive for the fourth consecutive quarter. The company's actual revenue was $288.20 million, which beat analysts' revenue expectations of $264.77 million by 8.85%. Root Inc's actual earnings were -$0.52 per share, which beat analysts' earnings expectations of -$1.93 per share by 72.99%. These results highlighted Root's continued operational improvement and strong financial momentum heading into the second half of 2024.
